task:
/home/user/Documents/training_deck.pptx is open in LibreOffice Impress — a 4-slide employee-onboarding deck with titles 'Welcome', 'Company History', 'Tools & Systems', 'Q&A'.

Add speaker notes to each slide as follows:

- Slide 1 notes: 'Introduce yourself and welcome new hires. Estimated time: 5 minutes.'
- Slide 2 notes: 'Walk through the company history timeline on the screen. Estimated time: 10 minutes.'
- Slide 3 notes: 'Demonstrate the tools live. Let attendees follow along. Estimated time: 20 minutes.'
- Slide 4 notes: 'Open the floor for questions. Hand out feedback forms. Estimated time: 15 minutes.'

Save the file back to /home/user/Documents/training_deck.pptx. The presentation must still have exactly 4 slides (no slides added or removed).

verification.command: check-notes-contain 0 "Introduce yourself and welcome new hires"
verification.description: Slide 1 notes contain 'Introduce yourself and welcome new hires'

verification.command: check-notes-contain 1 "Walk through the company history timeline"
verification.description: Slide 2 notes contain 'Walk through the company history timeline'
Slide 3 notes contain 'Demonstrate the tools live'
Slide 4 notes contain 'Open the floor for questions'
Presentation still has 4 slides (no slides added or removed)
File has been saved to disk
